message:
Address PR review feedback on parse_syslog octet-counting

- Make try_parse return builder_tag instead of bool for explicit
  builder tracking
- Update add_parsed to accept builder_tag parameter, eliminating
  heuristic message detection
- Simplify variable declaration: const auto input = arg.Value(i)
- Move runtime values into diagnostic .note() clauses for better
  deduplication
- Add warning in auto-mode when octet count prefix is ignored despite
  successful parse
- Update test reference to reflect new warning message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,3 +12,10 @@
     message: "Test message",
   },
 }
+warning: octet count prefix ignored
+ --> tests/functions/parse_syslog/octet_counting_length_mismatch.tql:4:5
+  |
+4 | x = x.parse_syslog()
+  |     ~
+  |
+  = note: message parsed without framing
